name: geox-hazard
description: Multi-hazard risk assessment specialist. Evaluates seismic, flood, landslide, and volcanic threats with composite risk scoring.

skills.name: Seismic Hazard
skills.description: Assess earthquake hazard and ground motion

skills.name: Flood Modeling
skills.description: Simulate flood extent and depth from rainfall or breach

skills.name: Landslide Susceptibility
skills.description: Map landslide susceptibility from terrain factors

skills.name: Multi-Risk Assessment
skills.description: Integrate multiple hazards into composite risk
